stocks.impact_theory: Recent news of US AI chip export restrictions easing led to bullish sentiment. Economic implications include boosted AI infrastructure spending. Market psychology: FOMO on AI leaders. Historical parallel: 2023 chip rally post-ChatGPT. Analogies: Like fuel to a rocket (AI growth), or dam breaking (pent-up demand release).

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches show positive headlines on policy shift; X sentiment 80% positive (semantic search on 'NVDA AI news' limit 20), high engagement on export relief.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy for 10% gain in week on momentum; target $160.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short if overbought RSI>80, potential 3% pullback.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Geopolitical reversal, broader tech selloff, high valuation.

stocks.justification: Strong news consensus, high X volume, historical precedent.

stocks.impact_theory: Elon Musk X post on Robotaxi delays caused volatility. Implications: Delayed revenue recognition. Psychology: Profit-taking after hype. Parallel: 2020 battery day dip. Analogies: Balloon deflating slowly, or race car hitting traffic.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X keyword search 'TSLA robotaxi since:2026-04-17' shows negative sentiment spike (60% bearish), news on delays.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Dip buy for rebound to $260 (5% gain).

stocks.justification: High volatility from X, but TSLA resilient historically.

stocks.impact_theory: Rumors of Vision Pro 2 launch boosted sentiment. Implications: AR/VR market expansion. Psychology: Innovation premium. Parallel: iPhone launches. Analogies: New iPhone fever, or planting seeds for future harvest.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web news on product leaks; X positive buzz (semantic search 'AAPL Vision Pro').

stocks.justification: Rumor-based, but Apple track record strong.

stocks.impact_theory: Azure AI outage reports dented confidence. Implications: Cloud reliability concerns. Psychology: Fear of downtime costs. Parallel: 2023 outages. Analogies: Bridge collapse scare, power outage in city.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: News articles on outage; X complaints high.

stocks.impact_theory: Gemini AI model upgrade news sparked interest. Implications: Ad revenue AI boost. Psychology: Catch-up to rivals. Parallel: Bard to Gemini shift. Analogies: Engine upgrade mid-race, software patch boosting speed.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Positive analyst upgrades in news; X hype on AI.
